sv.note: 54C = medium-rare. Thin flank ~15-20mm reaches core ~2h; whole-muscle so sear handles surface. AFME: 129-131F, 2-3h.

smoke.ref: Reverse-sear practice (A Grill For All Seasons)
smoke.note: After SV to 54C, brief hot smoke ~110C/24min for flavor/crust then hard sear. Slice thin against grain.

smoke_only.note: Smoke raw ~110C (225F) ~30-45min to ~49-52C, then sear to 54C. Surface pathogens killed by sear.

safe.note: Displayed floor 63C. 20mm@55C pasteurizes 2.5h; seared MR whole-muscle safe.

sv.ref: Anova/Girl Carnivore Denver; Baldwin core temps
sv.note: Denver (chuck, marbled) 130-135F (54-57C) 2-4h MR. 54C = MR. 2-3h fine for well-marbled cut.

smoke.note: Brief hot smoke ~110C/30min after SV then sear. Cherry/hickory suit beef.

smoke_only.note: Smoke raw ~115C (~240F) ~1h to ~49-52C, then sear to 54C.

safe.note: Displayed floor 63C; whole-muscle seared MR safe.

rationale: Confirmed 54C/2-3h for marbled chuck cut. safe 63 kept.

sv.ref: Steak University flat iron; Baldwin core temps
sv.note: Flat iron 130F (54C) MR, 2-4h. 2h adequate for thin cut.

smoke.note: Hot smoke ~110C/24min after SV then sear. Cherry/oak.

smoke_only.ref: Smoked Flat Iron (A Grill For All Seasons)
smoke_only.note: Smoke raw 225F (~107-115C) ~1h to ~52C then sear to 54C.

safe.note: Displayed floor 63C; whole-muscle seared MR safe.

rationale: Confirmed vs Steak University. safe 63 kept.

sv.ref: Baldwin — ground meat treated as slab; pasteurization table
sv.note: P3 GROUND: 1h->2-3h. Baldwin treats ground as slab: 55C 20mm=2.5h, 25mm=2.75h to pasteurize. A 1kg kebab log is thick; 1h unsafe. Hold >=2h after core reaches 55C.

smoke.note: After SV pasteurization, brief hot smoke ~105C/20min; final ~65C (well-done ground). Oak only.

smoke_only.note: Direct grill/smoke, NO time-pasteurization: cook to 71C (160F) instant kill. ~120C ~40min to 71C internal.

safe.ref: USDA FSIS — ground beef 160F/71C; Baldwin (SV alt)
safe.note: GROUND floor 71C (160F instant, pathogens throughout). NOT lowered. SV path may pasteurize at 55C only WITH >=2.5h hold (Baldwin).

rationale: P3: SV 1h->2-3h (thick ground log needs pasteurization time). safe kept 71; no raw-smoke->SV for ground.

sv.ref: Baldwin — ground as slab (25mm@55C=2.75h); Anova/Kenji burger
sv.note: P3 GROUND: 1.5h->2.5h. Baldwin 20mm@55C=2.5h, 25mm=2.75h; Kenji/Anova >=2h at 54.5C fully pasteurizes a MR burger. 1.5h short of pasteurization.

smoke.note: After SV pasteurization to 55C, quick light smoke/sear ~85C/15min; stays ~55C MR (safe because time-pasteurized).

smoke_only.note: Grill/smoke-only (no time pasteurization): cook to 71C (160F) instant. Pink MR burger ONLY safe via SV+time path.

safe.ref: USDA FSIS — ground beef 160F/71C; Baldwin (SV alt)
safe.note: GROUND floor 71C instant. NOT lowered. MR (55C) only safe when pasteurized by >=2.5h at >=54.4C (Baldwin).

rationale: P3: SV 1.5h->2.5h so a 55C MR burger is actually pasteurized. safe kept 71; no raw-smoke->SV for ground.

sv.note: 12h->24-36h. Cured brisket needs long collagen breakdown: 155F/68C for 24h sliceable, 36h shreddable. 65C valid (moister). 12h too short for 2.5kg.

smoke.note: After SV, rub and smoke ~105C (225F) ~2h for bark; final ~72C (deli slice). Cured pink from nitrite, not raw smoke ring.

smoke_only.note: Traditional: smoker 225F (107C), Texas-crutch at ~160F stall, cook to internal 203F (95C) fall-apart. Meathead eliminated steam step (2022). 5h too short; ~6-8h to hit 95C. Nitrite-protected.

safe.note: Cured whole-muscle brisket, nitrite present. Displayed floor 63C; SV 65C/24h+ far exceeds pasteurization.

rationale: SV 12h->24-36h (cured brisket collagen). smoke_only 110C/5h->107C/6-8h to 203F/95C (steam step removed 2022). safe 63 kept.

sv.note: 70C for 24-48h (36h melt-in-mouth). Collagen-rich; long low-temp gelatinizes while sliceable. Peel skin after cooking.

smoke.note: tgt 90->70: a 70C bath equilibrates core to 70C — 90C internal impossible on SV path. After SV, hot smoke ~105C/2h for bark. For firmer texture 82C/12h alt (then internal ~82).

smoke_only.note: Low-slow smoke ~110C ~6h until fork-tender (internal 85-90C to gelatinize on this path). Peel, slice.

safe.note: Tongue at 70C for 24-48h vastly over-pasteurized. Displayed floor 63C.

rationale: Confirmed 70C/24-48h. Corrected tgt 90->70 for physical consistency (core cannot exceed 70C bath); 82C alt noted. safe 63 kept.

sv.ref: Sous-vide marrow gentle set; then hot finish
sv.note: 64C ~1h warms marrow through without rendering it out (fat leaks if overheated). Finish hot for color.

smoke.note: After gentle SV, brief high heat ~110C/30min; target ~65C (jello-like). Oak.

smoke_only.note: 120C/1.5h->150C/~40min: smoke at 300F (150C) ~40min to internal 63-66C. AmazingRibs roasts 325F (163C) ~30min to 150F (65.6C). Low/slow renders marrow out before browning.

safe.note: Marrow (bone/fat) to 63C (145F) min. Target 63-66C for jello; hotter renders it liquid.

order_svsmoke.ref: Gentle SV then hot smoke (AmazingRibs marrow)

rationale: smoke_only 120C/1.5h->150C/~40min to 63-66C (would otherwise render out). SV path/tgt 65/safe 63 confirmed.
